script: This is a very long test script that should definitely exceed the 400 character limit that we've set for the audio generation to trigger the truncation functionality. We want to see how the API handles scripts that are too long and ensures they get truncated properly. This script contains multiple sentences and should be plenty long enough to test the truncation feature. The truncation should preserve sentence boundaries when possible and provide a clear warning to the user about what happened. This script is getting quite long now and should definitely trigger the truncation warning when we test it with the audio generation API endpoint.
